info.title: Journalists Service
info.description: Manages journalist profiles, outlet affiliations, and engagement tracking.

StatusBooleans.description: Cumulative status booleans merging DB statuses and email-gateway data. Per-journalist granularity.

brandIds.description: Brand UUIDs associated with this campaign journalist

OutreachStatusCount.description: Cumulative status counts. DB statuses (buffered, claimed, served, skipped) are cumulative. Email-gateway fields (contacted, sent, delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, repliesPositive, repliesNegative, repliesNeutral, repliesAutoReply, recipients) are passed through.

RepliesDetail.description: Granular reply breakdown from email-gateway. Present when reply data exists.

totalJournalists.description: Total journalists found for this group
Total journalists found matching the filters

groupedBy.description: Per-slug breakdown when groupBy is specified. Keys are slug values (or dynasty slugs for dynasty grouping).

StatsGroupBy.description: Dimension to group results by. When set, the response includes a groupedBy map keyed by slug.

dimensions.description: Dimension values for this group (e.g. { journalistId: '...' }). Empty when no groupBy.

totalCostInUsdCents.description: Total cost in USD cents (actual + provisioned)

actualCostInUsdCents.description: Actual metered cost in USD cents

runCount.description: Number of distinct runs contributing to this cost

groups.description: Cost groups. One entry per journalist when groupBy=journalistId, otherwise a single entry with totals.

bounced.description: Whether this email has bounced anywhere

unsubscribed.description: Whether this email has unsubscribed anywhere

GlobalStatus.description: Global email signals (bounced/unsubscribed). Null if no email-gateway data.

totalCostInUsdCents.description: Total cost in USD cents (actual + provisioned)

actualCostInUsdCents.description: Actual metered cost in USD cents

runCount.description: Number of distinct runs contributing to this cost

JournalistCost.description: Per-journalist cost aggregated across all campaigns. Null if no runs or runs-service is unreachable.

outletName.description: Outlet display name from outlets-service. Null if outlets-service is unreachable.

outletDomain.description: Outlet domain from outlets-service — used for logo resolution. Null if outlets-service is unreachable.

email.description: Global email (from journalists table apollo_email, fallback to best campaign email)

allOf.description: Cumulative status at brand scope (aggregate across campaigns). Present in brand mode, null in campaign mode.

byCampaign.description: Per-campaign status breakdown. Present in brand mode, null in campaign mode.

allOf.description: Cumulative status at campaign scope. Present in campaign mode, null in brand mode.

JournalistListItem.description: A journalist with scoped status booleans (brand/byCampaign/campaign/global) and per-campaign entries.

StatusCounts.description: Cumulative status counts across ALL journalists matching filters.

total.description: Total journalists matching filters (not affected by pagination)

blocked.description: Whether this outlet is blocked for the given brand+org

allOf.description: Cumulative counts at brand scope. Present in brand mode, null in campaign mode.
Cumulative status counts merging DB statuses and email-gateway data. Used for per-outlet and response-level aggregation.

byCampaign.description: Per-campaign counts. Present in brand mode, null in campaign mode.

allOf.description: Cumulative counts at campaign scope. Present in campaign mode, null in brand mode.

OutletStatusEntry.description: Status counts for a single outlet, aggregated across journalists.

total.description: Total journalists across all requested outlets

allOf.description: Cumulative status counts across all requested outlets.

brandId.description: Brand UUID to scope results to

campaignId.description: Campaign UUID to scope results to

ScopeFilters.description: Scoping filters for the query. Headers are used for tracing only, not for scoping.

outletIds.description: List of outlet UUIDs to get status for

post.summary: Pull next best journalist with verified email. When outletId is provided, searches that outlet only. When omitted, pulls outlets from outlets-service and loops until finding a journalist with a valid email. Resolves email via Apollo, checks dedup via email-gateway.

200.description: Next journalist with email, or { found: false } if exhausted

post.summary: Discover new journalists for a campaign+outlet. Creates a run, scrapes articles, scores journalists via LLM, and stores them as buffered. The x-brand-id header supports CSV format (e.g. uuid1,uuid2).

200.description: Discovery results with run ID and count of journalists found

get.summary: Get journalists associated with a campaign or brand, optionally filtered by outlet, run, and/or feature dynasty slug. Provide campaign_id, brand_id, or both.

schema.description: Filter by campaign. At least one of campaign_id or brand_id is required.
Filter by brand (returns journalists whose brand_ids array contains this brand). At least one of campaign_id or brand_id is required.
Filter by the run that created the journalist entries.
Filter by feature dynasty slug — resolves to all versioned slugs in the dynasty via features-service.

200.description: Campaign journalists with journalist details. The brandIds field is a UUID array.

400.description: Validation error — at least one of campaign_id or brand_id is required

get.summary: Get journalist stats with optional dynasty-aware filtering and grouping

schema.description: Filter by organization ID
Filter by campaign ID
Filter by outlet ID
Filter by brand ID (matches rows where this brand is in the brand_ids array)
Filter by exact feature slug
Comma-separated list of feature slugs to filter by. Use with groupBy=featureSlug for per-feature stats.
Filter by exact workflow slug
Comma-separated list of workflow slugs to filter by. Use with groupBy=workflowSlug for per-workflow stats.
Filter by feature dynasty slug — resolves to all versioned slugs in the dynasty
Filter by workflow dynasty slug — resolves to all versioned slugs in the dynasty

get.summary: Get journalist stats (public). Same filters as /stats but does not require identity headers.

schema.description: Filter by organization ID
Filter by campaign ID
Filter by outlet ID
Filter by brand ID (matches rows where this brand is in the brand_ids array)
Filter by exact feature slug
Comma-separated list of feature slugs to filter by. Use with groupBy=featureSlug for per-feature stats.
Filter by exact workflow slug
Comma-separated list of workflow slugs to filter by. Use with groupBy=workflowSlug for per-workflow stats.
Filter by feature dynasty slug — resolves to all versioned slugs in the dynasty
Filter by workflow dynasty slug — resolves to all versioned slugs in the dynasty

get.summary: Get cost stats for journalist discovery runs. Returns aggregated costs from runs-service, distributed per journalist. Requires x-org-id to scope costs to the requesting org.

schema.description: Brand ID to scope costs to (matches rows where this brand is in the brand_ids array)
Optionally narrow costs to a single campaign
Group costs by journalist. Each journalist's share is the run cost divided evenly across journalists in that run.

200.description: Cost stats (flat or grouped by journalistId)

get.summary: List journalists grouped by identity with per-campaign details. Each journalist has global data (email, cost, emailStatus) and a campaigns[] array with per-campaign entries. Filter by featureSlugs (CSV), featureDynastySlug (resolves to versioned slugs), and/or workflowSlug.

schema.description: Brand ID (required). Returns journalists whose brand_ids array contains this brand.
Optionally narrow to a single campaign
Comma-separated feature slugs to filter campaign rows
Filter by feature dynasty slug — resolves to all versioned slugs in the dynasty via features-service. Takes priority over featureSlugs.
Optionally filter campaign rows by workflow slug

200.description: Grouped journalist list with per-campaign entries

get.summary: Check if an outlet is blocked for a brand+org. Uses full dedup logic: checks lead-service for prior contacts, reply classification, 30-day no-reply cooldown, and 12-month expiry.

schema.description: Organization ID
Comma-separated brand UUIDs
Outlet ID to check

post.summary: Batch outlet outreach status enriched from email-gateway. Scoping is determined by scopeFilters in the body (not headers). Returns the high watermark outreach status across all journalists for each outlet. When scoped by brand, includes per-campaign breakdown.

400.description: Validation error or missing scope filters

post.summary: Transfer a solo-brand from one org to another. Updates org_id on all rows referencing only this brand. Skips co-branding rows (multiple brand IDs). Idempotent.

200.description: Transfer results with per-table update counts
